title: 600 Pcs Fibre Washer Assorted Kit, Red Steel Paper Insulation Washer Assorted Set, 12 Sizes, with a Storage Box
features: 【Premium Material】The plumbing washers and seals are made of excellent red steel paper fiber material, which is wear resistance, corrosion resistance, heat resistance, good insulation properties, and durable for long time use.
【Easy to Use】The flat outside tap washer has good insulation performance, which can spread a load, prevent damage to the surface being fixed, and insulate steel screws from.
【Easy to Store】Comes with a compact and see-through compartmented plastic storage case. All fiber washers plumbing is well packed in the plastic box for convenient storage.
【Wide Applications】These fiber washers are suitable for all kinds of transformers, electrical appliances, electronics industry, plumbing applications, as buffers or packers.
【What You Will Get】You will receive 600 pcs red steel paper washers in 12 different sizes, which can meet your various needs, enough for your daily use.
description: Product Description The outside tap washers are made of high-quality red steel paper fiber material, which is and durable for long time use. The fibre washers are flexible, which is easy to install with simple tools. Contains 12 sizes of the most commonly used washers, meet your different needs.
